mamba.TDS e1b1e28a-7b3c-4b8d-bfc3-5d9c1f8d9e6f <<<<<<< HEAD 2.2.428 ======= 2.2.429 >>>>>>> d81980795b81262488d81d80757d7f315d6ee9b3
Advanced Space Engineers Torch plugin: Syncs player factions to Discord with death logging, chat synchronization, server monitoring (SimSpeed), and security features. XML-based persistence with configurable death messages and admin command support.
mamba https://github.com/yourusername/mamba.TorchDiscordSync.Plugin
